it's standard for transpiled code.\n\n**Conclusion:**\n- The code is a simple, safe set of enum definitions for a trading/blockchain application.\n- No security threats, malware, obfuscation, or vulnerabilities are present.\n- The scores assigned are appropriate and consistent with the code's content.\n\n**Final Recommendation:**\n- Based on this review, I agree with the existing assessments.\n- The malware, obfuscated, and security risk scores should remain at 0.\n- No changes are necessary.\n\n**Overall, this code fragment is benign and poses no security threat.**",
